texto: You reached into my chest with your words. When you spoke, my heart danced. Love muddled thoughts based in reason. Interest withered like a flower in dry heat then your words wrapped themselves around my heart and yanked it from my body. Now I stand bewildered by the sight of my heart beating on the cold concrete floor.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sonya Watson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “You reached into my chest with your words. When you spoke, my heart danced. Love muddled thoughts…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, first-love, heartache pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e heartache.
